posts.author: BrandonJ (Brandon Joe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I was working with my team and noticed that when we receive an email from a client and get a notification on our mobile device. When you click it, it does not pull up the email. This makes it difficult to stay update on our clients on the move. Is there a way to enable this?
